findings.title: Missing review-ledger.json no longer stops the workflow
findings.detail: Acceptance Scenario 5 requires: show an error message and stop the workflow when review-ledger.json is missing.

findings.title: High-only wording conflicts with the new actionable-count routing
findings.detail: The retained accepted_risk/ignored note still says new/open high == 0 should go straight to approval. Rewrite to use actionable_count == 0.

findings.title: The diff changes downstream handoff behavior beyond the requested fix
findings.detail: Removed Reject option and added auto-approve-on-dismiss. Restored Reject and removed auto-approve-on-dismiss.

findings.title: No regression coverage for the new routing rules
findings.detail: This is a Markdown command file, not executable code. Testing is manual via specflow workflow execution.
findings.notes: N/A - Markdown command file, manual testing only
